calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents, And Imposing Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Donna L. Quan, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael B. Bassi, Tel. 415.986.8122 ext.708, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was not argued. CREDITOR MICHAEL BASSI'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents, And Imposing Monetary Sanction is granted. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Juanita Murphy, Proceedings not reported.

Donna L. Quan, Esq., appearing for Judgment Creditor. Michel B. Bassi, A Law Corporation. Judgment Debtor Todor Tabakov, sworn and examined by the court. Court granted motion for assignment. The right to payment of Judgment Debtor Todor Tabakov in fees and commissions and all rights to payment thereunder from ZipRealty, Inc. be and hereby are assigned to the Judgment Creditor Michel B. Bassi. A Law Corporation beginning June 1, 2014. until such time as the judgment herein is fully satisfied or this order is amended.
Order signed in open court.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi and Irene Barrese for Georgijs Gornostajevs.

No change of address has been provided to the Court since filing of the Substition of Attorney on July 27, 2011. No request for a continuance has been presented and no opposition has been filed, Therefore, the Court was inclined to proceed with today's hearing. Mr. Bassi addressed the issue of fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Tabakov'S Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Continued To Aug-31-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Georgijs Gornostajevs. Lilya Tabakov in Propria Persona. Todor Tabakov in Propria Persona. Robert Sprague former Attorney for the Tabakovs also present.

Ms. Sprague stated that the Substitution of Attorney will be filed this morning. Mr. Tabakov provided an accounting that is not in probate format or in a form to be filed. Mr. Tabakov is to proceed to vacate the house and remove all of Dahlia's personal property and deliver the keys to Mr. Bassi's office for which Mr. Bassi is to provide a receipt. Status of the accounting was continued to August 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Tabakov'S Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Jul-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Georgijs Gornostajevs.

Mr. Bassi stated that he had no information but that he believes that the Tabakov's are still in the house. A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Todor Tabakov and Lilya Tabakov to appear on July 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they have not filed the account and/or any other action that was required by the Court's order and judgment. The matter was continued to July 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Georgis Gornostajevs. Todor Tabakov in Propria Persona. Lilya Tabakov in Propria Persona.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court decided to keep the January 13, 2011 trial date so that Ms. Shirinova can appear or file a declaration regarding her commitment to represent the Tabakovs, and to indicate the amount of time needed to prepare for the trial and file a Substitution of Attorney.

Petition: 1. For Determination Of Right And Title To Decedents Real And Personal Properties 2. For Double Damages 3. For Imposition Of Constructive Tr
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Continued To Dec-09-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Georgis Gornostajevs.

Mr. Bassi stated that he sent a letter regarding mediation and the order allowing Mr. Maguire to withdraw as Counsel to Mr. Maguire but that he had not heard from him. Mr. Bassi also stated that Mr. Maguire did not appear at yesterdays deposition, that he called him, left messages and that he has doubt as to whehter Mr. Maguire will participate in the lawsuit or mediation. In addition, Mr. Bassi requested the Court set the matter for trial and rule on the Motion to Quash. The Petition for Determination of Right and Title to Decedent's Real and Personal Properties, etc. was set for trial on December 9, 2010 at 1:30 p.m. The Motion to Quash Deposition Subpoena Deces Tecum of Mayo was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Off Calendar Nov-18-2010 Denied

Petition: 1. For Determination Of Right And Title To Decedents Real And Personal Properties 2. For Double Damages 3. For Imposition Of Constructive Tr
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Continued To Nov-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Georgijs Gornostajevs. Charles Maguire for Todor Tabakov and Liliya Tabakov.

Mr. Maguire stated that Mr. Tabakov returned the week of mediation but after 8/9/10, that Mr. Bassi and Judge McDonald agreed to leave a date open if the parties are open to mediate, and that he had invited the Tabakovs to appear today but they are not present. Mr. Maguire also stated that he filed a response to the opposition, continued it thirty days, and gave them an opportunity to find counsel. The Court continued the petition to quash and the petition to determine rights to November 9, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for trial setting and status on mediation, and granted Mr. Maguire's motion to be relieved as counsel (subject to review of the order). Mr. Maguire advised the Court that there is an outstanding deposition for Liliya. Mr. Bassi inquired whether the Court could order the parties to mediate before November 9, 2010. Mr. Maguire stated that the Tabakovs were interested in mediation and that he believes the sticking point was the fact that Mr. Gornostajevs is overseas. Mr. Bassi stated that they have that problem solved. The Court stated that the parties will be ordered to mediate, that it intends to add the mediation language to the order, and that it wants at least the first session of mediation to occur before November 9, 2010. Mr. Maguire noted that the statute of limitations as to Quantum Meruit and Breach will run November 8, 2010, that he's prepared documents, and has warned the Tabakovs. The Court noted that there is a statute in the Civil Code of Procedures that extends it if the parties stipulate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: none present.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Georgijs Gornostajevs. Charles Maguire for Todor Tabakov and Lilia Tabakov (Respondents).

Mr. Bassi provided a case history, stated that Mr. Tabakov did not show up for his deposition and that he did not appear at mediation, and requested the matter be set for trial. Mr. Maguire stated that the Respondents needed time to get a lawyer and suggested continuing the matter. The matter continued to October 5 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for trial setting. The Motion to Quash on calendar for September 23, 2010 was also continued to October 5, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
